CustomField.description: Maximum number of dependency records this scan is allowed to create. When reached, the scan pauses automatically and prompts the user to raise the limit or accept partial results. Default: 5,000. Set to 0 to disable the cap (not recommended - the serializer will fail at high node counts). Do not raise above 5,000 without validating serializer heap capacity for your org's typical metadata depth. Ref: ISP-6072
CustomField.label: Maximum Components Per Scan
